title: leontopodium gnaphalioides
intro: Leontopodium gnaphalioides, also known as Edelweiss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This alpine plant is native to the European Alps and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Leontopodium gnaphalioides include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, Edelweiss is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
